questions.heading: FIND THE ANSWER TO ANY QUESTION
questions.subheading: We've gathered answers to the main questions
questions.how_to_contact_customer_support: How do I contact customer support?
questions.how_to_contact_customer_support_descript: To reach us, send an email to support@mail.dronewars.su. We will try to resolve your issue as quickly as possible.
questions.the_site_administrators_are_asking: Site administrators are asking for my account password—what should I do?
questions.the_site_administrators_are_asking_descr: If you receive such a request by email, in messages, or on social media, do not share your credentials or follow links in those messages. Our administrators never ask for account passwords.
questions.suspicious_activity_on_your_account: What should I do if I notice suspicious activity on my account?
questions.suspicious_activity_on_your_account_desc: If you notice suspicious activity on your account, change your password immediately and contact customer support.
questions.what_if_I_forgot_my_account_password: What if I forgot my account password?
questions.what_if_I_forgot_my_account_password_des: To reset your password, click “Forgot password?” on the sign-in page and follow the instructions.
questions.more_than_one_account_per_person: Can I use more than one account per person?
questions.more_than_one_account_per_person_descrip: Using multiple accounts for one person is not allowed. Violating this rule may result in all linked accounts being blocked.
questions.how_do_I_delete_my_account: How do I delete my account?
questions.how_do_I_delete_my_account_description: An account can only be deleted through our site’s technical support. This action is irreversible, and you will not be able to restore your account later.
questions.why_is_my_game_lagging_and_freezing: Why is my game lagging or freezing?
questions.why_is_my_game_lagging_and_freezing_desc: Lag may be caused by internet issues, high server load, or other technical problems. Try refreshing the page and checking that your connection is stable.
questions.change_the_nickname_on_the_site: Can I change my nickname on the site after registering?
questions.change_the_nickname_on_the_site_descript: Yes, you can change your nickname, password, or linked email on the Profile page.
questions.play_against_friends: Can I play against my friends?
questions.play_against_friends_description: Yes! Create a lobby and invite your friends using the room code or name.
questions.play_mobile_device: Can I play on a mobile device?
questions.play_mobile_device_description: No, the simulation is not designed for mobile devices; you may encounter issues during play.
questions.request_help_in_completing_the_game: Can I share video or photo hints and ask for help completing the game?
questions.request_help_in_completing_the_game_desc: It is forbidden to create and/or distribute tutorials on how to play the game in video, audio, and/or text formats. Providing such consultations is also prohibited. Breaking these rules may result in your site account being blocked.
questions.suggest_my_ideas: How can I suggest ideas for the game?
questions.suggest_my_ideas_description: We are always happy to hear your ideas and suggestions! You can contact us using the Feedback button on the site’s home page.
questions.receive_news_and_updates: How can I get news and updates about the game?
questions.receive_news_and_updates_description: Follow us on social media to be the first to hear about updates and new features.
